languageSettingsModal.title: App language
languageSettingsModal.description: Choose how Marinda appears on this device

index.languageDescription: Change the language used in the app
index.kidModePinDescription: Set or change the PIN used to exit kid mode

common.notReadyMessage: Please try again in a moment.

account.title: Account Settings
account.noFamilies: You are not a member of any families yet.

email.description: Email helps you access your account as a backup to your phone number.
email.label: Email
email.verifyHelper: Tap the link in your email to verify this address.
email.verifyMessage: We sent a verification link. Open it on this device to complete verification.
email.modalSubtitle: We’ll send a verification link to the new address.

member.title: My family member
member.subtitle: Update your nickname and choose the color that represents you across the app.
member.colorsError: Could not load theme colors. Please try again.
member.chooseThemeDescription: Pick the color that you like!

family.parentsOnlyWithCode: Only parents can manage family settings. Ask a parent to share the family code with you to join.
family.parentsOnly: Only parents can manage family settings.
family.noFamily: You are not attached to a family yet.
family.changeAvatarHint: Tap the photo to change your family avatar.
family.shareCodeIntro: Share the family code with your kids so they can join during signup.
family.shareMessage: Join our family on Marinda! Use this family code: {{code}}
family.codeHint: Kids can go to “Join with Code” and enter this code. You can rotate it anytime.

kidModePin.title: Kid mode PIN
kidModePin.parentsOnly: Only parents can configure the PIN used for kid mode.
kidModePin.changeDescription: Change the 4-digit PIN required to switch back to parent mode.
kidModePin.setDescription: Set a 4-digit PIN before using kid mode.
kidModePin.mismatchMessage: Please enter the same PIN twice.
kidModePin.savedMessage: Your kid mode PIN has been updated.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Manage subscription and billing for your family.
billing.billingRefreshedMessage: Subscription state was synced with RevenueCat.
billing.changeOwnerMessage: Make {{name}} the billing owner? The subscription will reset to Basic until they subscribe.
billing.syncing: Subscription status is still syncing with RevenueCat.
billing.billingOwnerHint: The billing owner pays for Pro. Only parents can be billing owners.
billing.manageHint: To cancel or change payment, open Settings → Subscriptions on your device.
billing.noPackages: No Pro packages available. Configure RevenueCat or enable dev mode.
billing.parentsOnly: Only parents can manage billing. Ask your family’s billing owner to make changes.

addMember.title: Add a family member
addMember.subtitle: Choose how you want to add someone to your family.
addMember.inviteBySms: Invite a new member by SMS
addMember.addKidNoPhone: Add a kid without a phone

addKid.title: Add kid (no phone)
addKid.subtitle: This creates a family member without an account. It's meant for kids who don't have a phone.

smsInvite.title: Invite by SMS
smsInvite.subtitle: Enter the phone number and select the role. The invitee’s role will be locked.
smsInvite.noFamilyMessage: You need an active family to send an invite.
smsInvite.sentMessage: We sent an SMS invite to this phone number.

profileMenu.logOutMessage: Are you sure you want to log out?
profileMenu.welcomeMessage: Sign in or create your family account to continue
profileMenu.noKidsMessage: Add a kid or teen first to use kid mode.
profileMenu.kidModePinRequiredMessage: Set up a kid mode PIN in Settings before entering kid mode.
profileMenu.enterParentPinMessage: Enter your 4-digit PIN to switch back to parent mode.
